creator: wtheesfeld@mailbox.org
text:
Created attachment 173173
Patch to add macbook pro 9,2 support to asmc

The asmc kernel module is not actively maintained or updated, and has no entries for the MacBookPro 9,2 (13", mid 2012).

I have created a patch against the 10.3-RELEASE source to add support for the 9,2 macbook pro.

I have attached my patch file, generated with "svn diff" in the /usr/src/sys/dev/asmc directory.

I would like to submit this patch for review and inclusion to the official source.

Thank You

William Theesfeld Jr
wtheesfeld@mailbox.org
